stemHtml: Which statement from the choice below characterises a Satellite Based Augmentation System (SBAS)?

options.a: SBAS is an augmentation device for Ground Based Augmentation Systems.
options.b: The SBAS monitor stations send corrected positions to the users within the range of the station.
options.c: SBAS is able to provide approach and landing operations with vertical guidance.
options.d: The ground reference station transmits corrections directly to the user by VHF/UHF data-link.
